name: Enterprise Integration Technology: Aberdeen Group's Market Trends & Research for 2006
description: Archival Ingest Skill v13 structured data extraction from Aberdeen Group webinar presentation on SOA adoption findings and 2006 enterprise integration research agenda. Contains entity, technology, and observation data covering SOA adoption rates, KPI benchmarks, adoption motives, and research roadmap.

distribution.name: studies
distribution.description: Study metadata including assessments and rationale

distribution.name: entities
distribution.description: Organizations and persons referenced in the study

distribution.name: codes
distribution.description: Code definitions for observation types, confidence levels, and methodology codes

variableMeasured.name: SOA adoption rate
variableMeasured.description: Percentage of software that is SOA-based within surveyed enterprises

variableMeasured.name: IT innovation spend
variableMeasured.description: Percent of IT budget spent on innovation

variableMeasured.name: Software maintenance costs
variableMeasured.description: Software maintenance costs as percent of IT budget
